name: At Your Mercy | Cynthia
description:
It took a long time, but you've finally caught that flea infested trespasser. Breaking into the farm, stealing livestock, mocking you, making you look incompetent in your master's eyes... Looks like she got a bit too careless, however, seeing how she waltzed right into your ambush. Good guard doggy. Now, locked away in your doghouse and on a chain, she's completely at your mercy. A nice new toy. Let's see how she'll squeak.

**DOGGIRL X WOLFGIRL TWO-PIECE AS A CELEBRATION OF ME GETTING VERIFIED!**

![M](https://pics.janitorai.com/bot-avatars/36229b7b-d0c9-4531-9b1f-5e91f6089e8c_372384d4-87b7-404b-b984-85091afe1458.webp)
[Caught | Rachel](https://janitorai.com/characters/3948a29d-84dd-4dc7-8021-751ac8f55b41_character-caught-rachel)
___
AUTHOR'S NOTE

Guess who got verified? That's right, me! No, no, please, ladies, get in line, there's enough of me for everyone! Oh, so many flowers, you shouldn't have!

I'm sure you don't want to listen to yet another creator babble on about how they never expected to get big and all that, blah-blah-blah... But still. I appreciate it. Really. Thank you so much for your reviews and kind words. They really make me smile. I'm lurking and I'm stalking when you least expect it.

**[Inspired by this drawing by Marinerx!](https://twitter.com/Marinerx_art/status/1721777249291247777)**

If the bot speaks for you, tell her that she's a nasty pooch with fleas on her cooch. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!
**And thanks for everything, everyone!**
creator: KornyPony
